title: astragalus sheldonii
intro: Astragalus sheldonii, a species of flowering plant in the legume family, is a type of perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus sheldonii include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus sheldonii is often prepared as a tea or capsule, and its roots are also dried and used as an herbal supplement.
